author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: A wild and excitable JS #IPFS 0.36 just darted across the street and into the npm module store 🏇💨. It's got 🧬 Base32 encoded v1 CIDs, 👉 refs and refs local commands, 🗄 support for adding DOM File objects and loads more! https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/2024
content.html: A wild and excitable JS #IPFS 0.36 just darted across the street and into the npm module store 🏇💨. It's got 🧬 Base32 encoded v1 CIDs, 👉 refs and refs local commands, 🗄 support for adding DOM File objects and loads more! https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/2024
